name: form-builder
description: Comprehensive form builder, validation rules, UI components, and data binding. Use when Codex needs to: (1) Generate HTML5 form templates with semantic structure, (2) Implement multi-step wizards with conditional logic, (3) Handle file uploads with progress tracking, (4) Create responsive layouts using CSS Grid/Flexbox, (5) Bind forms to JSON schemas, (6) Implement accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), or (7) Export/import form definitions (JSON/YAML)
author: 杜甫 <杜甫@openclaw.ai>
